checks_reviewed.evidence: Plan reviewed as a planning-only detailed report plan; it covers all six SOUL roles, per-role output files, bridge/repo-local/agent separation, validation expectations, and no implementation scope.

Baseline commit afd9208adde3c1721c0ea7c5ea0e87af96e2b926 recorded; target plan is untracked and reviewed as the requested path. Dirty worktree is not a local harness failure per AGENTS.md lines 55-60.
Repo-local skill inventory matches the plan's expected Product/Planning, Design, Mobile App Dev, Backend/API Integrator, QA/Release, wm, wm-orchestrate, and git-workflow skill assumptions.
Custom agent inventory contains the wm-*, po-*, design-*, and legacy mobile-* agents considered by the plan.
Pod-native skill inventory contains setup/readiness skills only, supporting the plan's role-work bridge recommendation.
Source-backed N/A for this review because the target is a planning-only evidence report plan and explicitly excludes code implementation, new skill creation, new agent creation, commit, PR, or merge.
Source-backed N/A for this review because no Codex runtime artifact is being implemented by the reviewed plan; later skill/agent/doc implementation checks are listed in the plan.
Source-backed N/A for this review because no workspace code path is changed by the planning-only artifact.
Source-backed N/A because the reviewed artifact is not a mobile UI/runtime implementation and does not modify Expo React Native screens.

residual_risks: The final role-specific analysis documents may still fail review if they do not cite the SoT sources, preserve pod-native versus repo-local boundaries, or convert the plan's role-specific requirements into concrete implementation criteria.
Live OpenClaw/OrbStack pod behavior, GitHub branch protection, EAS, Stitch, mobile-mcp, and other external platform behavior remain unproven by this planning-only review.
